channel.title: Echo Thread Podcast
channel.description: Track-by-track Lily Roo conversations, starting with Analog Myth.
channel.itunes:author: Lily Roo
channel.itunes:summary: Echo Thread Podcast follows Lily Roo releases through track-by-track conversations, starting with Analog Myth.

item.title: Analog Myth: The Clock Cannot Explain This
item.description: Jasper Fields sits down with Lily Roo for a full album play-through of Analog Myth, with the songs in the room.
item.content:encoded:
Jasper Fields sits down with Lily Roo for a full album play-through of Analog Myth, with the songs in the room.

The conversation moves through social anxiety, girls camp, analog clocks, tea as repetition, tiny-house freedom, cruise-ship bowling, slow walking, and carrying light back into the same room.

Album page: https://www.lilyroo.com/analog-myth.html

Watch on YouTube: https://youtu.be/xX2-Xf161js

Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/album/6Ujyp8tXa5UxheJJC2B6kL
item.itunes:author: Lily Roo
item.itunes:subtitle: A full album play-through for Analog Myth.
item.itunes:summary: Jasper Fields sits down with Lily Roo for a full album play-through of Analog Myth, with the songs in the room.
